allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; moves=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['moves']; [print\(m['id'], m['name'], m.get\('nom',''\)\) for m in moves if 'Fake' in m.get\('name',''\) or 'Bluff' in m.get\('nom',''\)]")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Recurse src, public -Include '*.json','*.ts','*.tsx','*.js','*.jsx' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); usages=d.get\('usages'\) or d.get\('pokemon',{}\).get\('usages',[]\); ch=next\(\(u for u in usages if u.get\('provider'\)=='champions'\),None\); import pprint; pprint.pprint\(ch and {k:\(ch[k][:1] if isinstance\(ch[k],list\) else ch[k]\) for k in ch}\)")
